tool.name: Sourmash Sketch DNA
tool.description: compute MinHash sketches from DNA sequences
tool.command: sourmash sketch dna #set $ksize_list = [] #for $k in $sketch_params.kmer_sizes #silent $ksize_list.append('k=' + str($k)) #end for #if str($sketch_params.abund) == 'true' #set $abund_str = 'abund' #else #set $abund_str = 'noabund' #end if #set $param_str = ','.join($ksize_list) + ',scaled=' + str($sketch_params.scaled) + ',' + $abund_str -p '$param_str' $check_sequence $singleton #if str($merge_name).strip() --merge '$merge_name' #end if -o output.sig.zip #for $f in $input_sequences '$f' #end for

param.name: input_sequences
param.label: Input sequences
param.help: FASTA or FASTQ files, uncompressed or gzip-compressed.

param.name: kmer_sizes
param.label: k-mer size(s)
param.help: One or more k-mer sizes to sketch. Multiple sizes produce multiple sketches in the output.

validator.message: Select at least one k-mer size.

param.label: Scaled factor
param.help: 1 in N k-mers are kept. Smaller values produce larger, more sensitive sketches.

param.name: abund
param.label: Track k-mer abundances
param.help: When enabled, k-mer counts are stored in the sketch (abund). Default: no abundance tracking (noabund).

param.label: Check sequence validity
param.help: Raise an error if any input sequence contains characters that are not valid DNA.

param.label: Sketch each record individually
param.help: Compute one signature per sequence record rather than one per input file.

param.name: merge_name
param.label: Merge all inputs under this name (optional)
param.help: If set, all input files are merged into a single signature with this name.

validator.message: Name may contain letters, digits, spaces, hyphens, and underscores only.

param.name: HI_MIKE
param.label: HI MIKE (optional)
param.help: If set, all input files are merged into a single signature with this name.

validator.message: Name may contain letters, digits, spaces, hyphens, and underscores only.

tool.help:
**Sourmash Sketch DNA**
Computes MinHash sketches (also called *signatures*) from DNA sequences. Sketches are compact representations of sequence content that enable fast similarity searches, taxonomic classification, and dataset comparisons without alignment.
-----
**Inputs**
One or more FASTA or FASTQ files (uncompressed or gzip-compressed).
-----
**Sketch parameters**
The output sketch is controlled by three values:
- **k-mer size** (default 31): shorter k-mers are more sensitive; longer k-mers are more specific. - **Scaled factor** (default 1000): 1 in N k-mers are retained; smaller values produce larger, more sensitive sketches. - **Abundance tracking** (default off): when enabled, k-mer counts are stored in the sketch for relative-abundance queries.
You may select multiple k-mer sizes; each produces a separate sketch in the output file.
-----
**Outputs**
A single sourmash signature collection in zip format (``output.sig.zip``), compatible with all sourmash ``compare``, ``search``, and ``gather`` commands.
-----
**Tips**
- Use ``scaled=1000`` (default) for whole-genome comparisons. - Use ``scaled=100`` for metagenome comparisons where sensitivity matters more. - Enable **singleton** mode to produce one sketch per FASTA record rather than one per file (useful for individual gene or contig sketches). - Set a **merge name** when sketching multiple files representing the same organism and you want a single combined sketch.
-----
HI MIKE
**References**
Brown CT and Irber L (2016). sourmash: a library for MinHash sketching of DNA. *Journal of Open Source Software*, 1(5), 27. doi:10.21105/joss.00027
Full documentation: https://sourmash.readthedocs.io/en/latest/sourmash-sketch.html
